munit:config.name: user-greeting-api-test-suite.xml
munit:config.doc:name: MUnit Configuration
munit:config.doc:description: MUnit test suite configuration for user-greeting-api flows

munit:test.name: user-greeting-flow-positive-Alice
munit:test.description: Positive: GET /greet with name=Alice returns personalized greeting
munit:test.doc:name: User Greeting Flow Positive Alice Test
munit:test.doc:description: Verifies that the greeting flow returns a personalized message when name=Alice is provided as a query parameter

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Initial Event
munit:set-event.doc:description: Initializes the test event payload with an empty object

set-variable.doc:name: Set Query Param Attributes
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP query parameters with name=Alice to simulate GET /greet?name=Alice

flow-ref.name: user-greeting-flow
flow-ref.doc:name: Invoke User Greeting Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Calls user-greeting-flow; flow should extract Alice from query params and build personalised greeting

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts that the response payload is not null

munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:name: Assert Personalized Greeting
munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:description: Verifies that greeting field contains Hello, Alice!

munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:name: Assert Welcome Message
munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:description: Verifies that message field contains the standard welcome text

munit:test.name: user-greeting-flow-positive-default-guest
munit:test.description: Positive: GET /greet without name query param defaults userName to Guest
munit:test.doc:name: User Greeting Flow Positive Default Guest Test
munit:test.doc:description: Verifies that the greeting flow defaults to Guest and returns the expected JSON when no name query parameter is provided

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Event
munit:set-event.doc:description: Initializes the event payload for the test

set-variable.doc:name: Set Attributes Variable
set-variable.doc:description: Sets empty query parameters to simulate GET /greet without a name, triggering the default Guest behaviour

flow-ref.name: user-greeting-flow
flow-ref.doc:name: Invoke User Greeting Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Calls user-greeting-flow; flow should default userName to Guest when name is absent

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Asserts that the flow response payload is not null

munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:name: Assert Default Guest Greeting
munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:description: Verifies that the greeting field defaults to Hello, Guest! when no name is supplied

munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:name: Assert Welcome Message
munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:description: Verifies that the message field matches the expected Welcome to MuleVibes Greeting API text
